# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    DependsOn: VPC
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RTB1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: VGW
    Properties:
      RouteTableName: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  LB:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      Name: myloadbalancer
      Subnets: [!Ref PublicSubnet1]
      SecurityGroups: []
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Type: application

  ALBListener:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener'
    DependsOn: LB
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !GetAtt LB.Arn
      Protocol: HTTP
      Port: 80
      DefaultActions:
        -
          TargetGroupArn: !GetAtt ALBTargetGroup.Arn
          Type: forward

  ALBTargetGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup'
    Properties:
      Name: mytargetgroup
      Protocol: HTTP
      Port: 80
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 10
      HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5
      HealthyThresholdCount: 3

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn: LB
    Properties:
      ImageId: 'ami-abcd1234'
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt SG.GroupId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      DatabaseName: mydb
      MasterUsername: masteruser
      MasterUserPassword: password
      Engine: mysql

  SG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: allow ssh
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        -
          IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '22'
          ToPort: '22'
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

Outputs:
  LBUrl: !Sub 'http://${LB.DnsName}'
